articles.title: Polygon to Raise Network Fees as a Measure Against Spam Transactions
articles.description: Polygon will raise its network fees to 30 Gwei from 1 Gwei, co-founder Sandeep Nailwal revealed in a forum post. The network is also doubling down on its foray into non-fungible tokens (NFT) with an integration on the OpenSea marketplace.

articles.title: XRP holders won’t join as defendants in the SEC vs. Ripple case
articles.description: US District Judge Analisa Torres ruled on Monday that a group of individuals who own XRP can offer their “meaningful perspective” in the US Securities and Exchange Commission’s (SEC) case against Ripple, despite denying their motion to intervene as defendants.
